title: केतु दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री केतु दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम् ॥

ॐ कें केतवे नमः

केतुदोषनिवारणार्थं स्तोत्रं वक्ष्यामि मंगलम्।
केतुग्रहं प्रसन्नार्थं भक्त्या पठत सादरम्॥१॥

पलाशपुष्पसंकाशं तारकाग्रहमस्तकम्।
रौद्रं रौद्रात्मकं घोरं तं केतुं प्रणमाम्यहम्॥२॥

धूम्रवर्णं द्विबाहुं च छायारूपं भयंकरम्।
ध्वजाकारं महाकायं तं केतुं प्रणमाम्यहम्॥३॥

चित्रगुप्तसमं केतुं मोक्षमार्गप्रदर्शकम्।
आध्यात्मिकज्ञानदं देवं तं केतुं प्रणमाम्यहम्॥४॥

केतुदोषो विनश्येत केतुपीडा लयं गता।
गणेशकृपया नित्यं केतुशान्तिर्भविष्यति॥५॥

गणपतिं नमस्कृत्य केतुदोषनिवारकम्।
सर्वविघ्नहरं देवं केतुग्रहप्रसादकम्॥६॥

मंगलवारे पठेद्यस्तु केतुदोषनिवारणम्।
सप्तवारं पठेन्नित्यं केतुदोषो विनश्यति॥७॥

॥ इति श्री केतु दोष निवारण स्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Ketu Dosh Nivaran Stotram ||

Om Kem Ketave Namah

Ketu-dosha-nivaranartham Stotram Vakshyami Mangalam.
Ketu-graham Prasanna-artham Bhaktya Pathata Sadaram.||1||

Palasha-pushpa-sankasham Taraka-graha-mastakam.
Raudram Raudra-atmakam Ghoram Tam Ketum Pranamami-aham.||2||

Dhumra-varnam Dvi-bahum Cha Chhaya-rupam Bhayankaram.
Dhvaja-akaram Maha-kayam Tam Ketum Pranamami-aham.||3||

Chitra-gupta-samam Ketum Moksha-marga-pradarshakam.
Adhyatmika-jnana-dam Devam Tam Ketum Pranamami-aham.||4||

Ketu-dosho Vinashyeta Ketu-pida Layam Gata.
Ganesha-kripaya Nityam Ketu-shantir-bhavishyati.||5||

Ganapatim Namaskritya Ketu-dosha-nivarakam.
Sarva-vighna-haram Devam Ketu-graha-prasadakam.||6||

Mangala-vare Pathed-yastu Ketu-dosha-nivaranam.
Sapta-varam Pathen-nityam Ketu-dosho Vinashyati.||7||

|| Iti Shri Ketu Dosh Nivaran Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: केतुदोष निवारण हेतु यह मंगलकारी स्तोत्र। पलाशपुष्प जैसे वर्ण वाले, तारकाग्रह मस्तक, रौद्र, घोर केतु को प्रणाम। धूम्रवर्ण, द्विबाहु, छायारूप, ध्वजाकार, महाकाय केतु को प्रणाम। मोक्षमार्ग प्रदर्शक, आध्यात्मिक ज्ञानदाता केतु को प्रणाम। गणेश कृपा से केतुशान्ति होती है। मंगलवार को सात बार नित्य पाठ करने से केतुदोष नष्ट होता है।
benefits: Traditionally recited for removal of ketu dosha and ketu mahadasha afflictions
Pacifies the shadow planet Ketu for astrological relief
Invokes Lord Ganesha as the Ketu-dosha remover
Traditionally recited for removal of spiritual confusion and aimlessness caused by ketu
Channels Ketu's energy positively towards moksha and spiritual growth
Best recited on Tuesdays, seven times daily
description: Ketu Dosh Nivaran Stotram — केतु दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम् — is a devotional hymn of praise offered to Lord Ganesha. Rooted in Graha Shanti Vidhi, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Devotees recite this prayer to pacify the shadow planet Ketu for astrological relief and remove spiritual confusion and aimlessness caused by Ketu. It is also said to channel Ketu's energy positively towards moksha and spiritual growth. For best results, devotees chant this on Tuesday (Mangalvar). With 7 verses and a reading time of about 4 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Ketu Dosh Nivaran Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Ketu Dosh Nivaran Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Prayer to remove Ketu affliction and channel its energy for spiritual growth.
